languages.text: "...но ты, ксенос — насмешка над Познанием, жалкий мясник, который не способен создать ничего нового. Все проводимые тобой "исследования" создают лишь дисфункциональных кадавров, восхваляющих твое тщеславие. Во имя Омниссии, будь проклят, мерзостное отродье. Труды твои да обратятся прахом и канут в забвение". {n}Эоганн неожиданно громко произносит эти слова. Кожа на его искалеченном горле вздувается от напряжения.{/n}

"...but you, xenos, are a mockery of knowledge. A pathetic butcher incapable of creating anything new. All your so-called 'research' produces nothing but dysfunctional cadavers, monuments to your own vanity. In the name of the Omnissiah, be damned, vile spawn! May your works turn to dust and sink into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...но ты, ксенос — насмешка над Познанием, жалкий мясник, который не способен создать ничего нового. May your work turn to dust and disappear into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}

May your works turn to dust and sink into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}

languages.text: "... aber Ihr, Xenos, seid eine Verhöhnung von Wissen. Ein erbärmlicher Metzger, der nicht imstande ist, etwas Neues zu schaffen. Alle Eure sogenannten 'Forschungen' bringen nichts als dysfunktionale Kadaver hervor, Monumente Eurer eigenen Eitelkeit. Im Namen des Omnissiah, seid verdammt, elende Xenosbrut. Möget Ihr zu Staub zerfallen und in Vergessenheit versinken!" {n}Eogunn sagt diese Worte mit einem Mal so laut, dass die Haut seiner zerfetzten Kehle zum Zerreißen gespannt ist.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...but you, xenos, are a mockery of knowledge. A pathetic butcher incapable of creating anything new. All your so-called 'research' produces nothing but dysfunctional cadavers, monuments to your own vanity. In the name of the Omnissiah, be damned, vile spawn! May your works turn to dust and sink into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}

Alle Eure sogenannten 'Forschungen' bringen nichts als dysfunktionale Kadaver hervor, Monumente Eurer eigenen Eitelkeit. Im Namen des Omnissiah, seid verdammt, elende Xenosbrut. Möget Ihr zu Staub zerfallen und in Vergessenheit versinken!" {n}Eogunn sagt diese Worte mit einem Mal so laut, dass die Haut seiner zerfetzten Kehle zum Zerreißen gespannt ist.{/n}

languages.text: « Mais vous, xénos, n'êtes qu'un affront à la Connaissance. Un boucher pathétique, incapable d'innover. Vos soi-disant "recherches" ne produisent rien d'autre que des cadavres dysfonctionnels, des monuments à la gloire de votre propre vanité. » {n}Le ton d'Eogunn se fait soudain plus assuré, assourdissant. La peau de sa gorge mutilée vibre sous l'effort.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...but you, xenos, are a mockery of knowledge. A pathetic butcher incapable of creating anything new. All your so-called 'research' produces nothing but dysfunctional cadavers, monuments to your own vanity. In the name of the Omnissiah, be damned, vile spawn! May your works turn to dust and sink into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « ... Mais vous, xénos, n'êtes qu'un affront à la Connaissance. Un boucher pathétique, incapable d'innover. Vos soi-disant "recherches" ne produisent rien d'autre que des cadavres dysfonctionnels, des monuments à la gloire de votre propre vanité. Au nom de l'Omnimessie, je vous condamne, vile créature ! Puissent vos œuvres tomber en poussière et sombrer dans l'oubli ! » {n}Le ton d'Eogunn se fait soudain plus assuré, assourdissant. La peau de sa gorge mutilée vibre sous l'effort.{/n}

languages.text: «... pero tú, xenos, eres una burla del conocimiento. Un carnicero patético, incapaz de crear algo nuevo. Tu tan cacareada "investigación" no produce sino cadáveres tan deformes y retorcidos como tu mente, un tributo a tu vanidad. En nombre del Omnissiah, ¡te maldigo, engendro inmundo! ¡Que tus obras se conviertan en polvo y queden relegadas al olvido!». {n}Eogunn habla con fuerza inusitada y ves cómo la piel de su maltrecha garganta se hincha por el esfuerzo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...but you, xenos, are a mockery of knowledge. A pathetic butcher incapable of creating anything new. languages.text: "Ancak sen zeno, irfanın alay konususun. Yeni hiçbir şey yaratmaktan âciz acınası bir kasapsın. Senin o 'araştırma' dediğin şey; işlevsiz kadavralardan, kendi kibrinin anıtlarından başka bir şey üretmiyor. Hermesih adına lanet olsun sana pislik! Eserlerin toza dönüşsün, unutulup gitsin!" {n}Konuştukça parçalanmış boğazının derisi şişen Eogunn; bu kelimeleri ani, irkiltici bir sesle söylüyor.{/n}

May your works turn to dust and sink into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}

Eserlerin toza dönüşsün, unutulup gitsin!" {n}Konuştukça parçalanmış boğazının derisi şişen Eogunn; bu kelimeleri ani, irkiltici bir sesle söylüyor.{/n}

languages.text: “……可你这异形，不过是对知识二字的亵渎。一个可悲的屠夫，根本无法创造任何新事物。你所谓的‘研究’，只会产出一堆功能失调的尸体，化作你虚荣心的纪念碑。奉欧姆尼赛亚之名，诅咒你这肮脏的孽种！愿你的一切造物归于尘土，湮没于虚无之中！”{n}伊奥贡突然吼道，声音大得惊人，残破的喉部皮肤因发力而鼓胀。{/n}
languages.original_text: "...but you, xenos, are a mockery of knowledge. A pathetic butcher incapable of creating anything new. All your so-called 'research' produces nothing but dysfunctional cadavers, monuments to your own vanity. In the name of the Omnissiah, be damned, vile spawn! May your works turn to dust and sink into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “……可你这异形，不过是对知识二字的亵渎。一个可悲的屠夫，根本无法创造任何新事物。你所谓的‘研究’，只会产出一堆功能失调的尸体，化作你虚荣心的纪念碑。奉欧姆尼赛亚之名，诅咒你这肮脏的孽种！愿你的一切造物归于尘土，湮没于虚无之中！”{n}伊奥贡突然吼道，声音大得惊人，残破的喉部皮肤因发力而鼓胀。{/n}

languages.text: 「……だが、貴様は、異種族よ、知識への侮辱そのものだ。何一つ新しいものを生み出せぬ、哀れな肉屋にすぎん。貴様のいわゆる『研究』とやらが生み出すのは、機能不全の死体――貴様自身の虚栄の記念碑ばかりだ。オムニッシアの御名において、呪われよ、悪辣なる落とし子め！ 貴様の業績が塵と化し、忘却の彼方へ消え去らんことを！」{n}エオガンは突如、驚くほどの声量でこれらの言葉を発し、ずたずたになった喉の皮膚が、力みで膨れ上がる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "...but you, xenos, are a mockery of knowledge. A pathetic butcher incapable of creating anything new. All your so-called 'research' produces nothing but dysfunctional cadavers, monuments to your own vanity. In the name of the Omnissiah, be damned, vile spawn! May your works turn to dust and sink into oblivion!" {n}Eogunn speaks these words with sudden, startling volume, the skin of his mangled throat bulging from the strain.{/n}
